items.q: Do you offer temporary staffing solutions for health and care in Tower Hamlet?
items.a: Yes. Our temporary care staffing agency provides healthcare assistants, support workers, and live-in carers for urgent, short-term, and ongoing needs.

items.q: Can you supply night-shift staff for care homes?
items.a: Absolutely. We have agency care workers available for planned or emergency night cover.

items.q: Do you work with private households as well as facilities?
items.a: Yes. As an agency for care workers , we support both private clients and organisations.

items.q: Are your staff trained to meet CQC requirements?
items.a: Yes. All staff are trained to CQC standards and follow industry best practices.

items.q: Can you cover multiple sites across Tower Hamlet
items.a: Yes. Our healthcare assistant recruitment agency can support clients with facilities in neighbouring boroughs.

At Vigil Care Staffing, we focus on the long-term stability of your facility: Reduced Operational Stress: Managing rotas in a high-turnover environment is exhausting. This ensures that when inspectors arrive, your staffing files are flawless. Reduced Operational Stress: Managing rotas in a high-turnover environment is exhausting. Our Tower Hamlets booking team is available around the clock to handle emergency requirements. Our goal is to be your long-term staffing partner, helping you focus on care delivery while we handle your workforce needs. Choosing us as your healthcare recruitment agency in Tower Hamlet brings tangible benefits: When you choose us as your care staffing agency in Tower Hamlets , you gain access to a proactive, flexible, and highly skilled workforce. We take a proactive approach to staffing, ensuring you have access to temporary staffing solutions for health and care exactly when you need them. Borough-Level Coverage & Neighbourhoods Served Our temporary care staffing agency serves all areas within Tower Hamlet, including: Whitechapel Bethanal Green Canary Wharf Bow Mile End Poplar Stepney Limehouse Wapping Isle of Dogs We also offer cross-borough cover for clients with facilities in City of London (to the west) Hackney (to the north) Newham (to the east) Southwark (to the southwest, across the river) Greenwich (to the southeast, across the river) Lewisham (to the south, across the river) This means you can rely on one staffing partner to maintain consistent service quality across multiple locations. Facilities We Serve in Tower Hamlet We provide staffing for: Care homes (residential and nursing) Private households requiring live-in or respite care Supported living schemes Day centres and respite care services Rehabilitation and step-down units NHS clinics and community services Our flexibility makes us a preferred HCA agency for both small-scale providers and multi-site care groups.

Our Vetting & Compliance Process We ensure every agency healthcare assistant and support worker we place meets strict compliance requirements: Enhanced DBS check to meet safeguarding standards. Full ID verification and reference checks. Mandatory training in infection prevention, manual handling, safeguarding adults, and basic life support. Specialist courses such as dementia care, autism awareness, and palliative care.

Onboarding in line with our staff vetting process and onboarding standards. Our compliance framework ensures that staff are not only qualified but also aligned with your service’s values and operational standards.
